# Compliance Obligation Schedule

**Matter:** Foxwood Technologies Ltd. -- Regulatory Compliance Review
**Prepared by:** Compliance Counsel
**Date:** April 10, 2026

This schedule sets out the ongoing compliance obligations of Foxwood Technologies Ltd.
("Company") arising from its operating licences, data processing agreements, and applicable
statutory requirements.

## Schedule A: Regulatory Obligations

| Responsible Party | Obligation | Due Date | Status | Control | Document |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Company | File annual privacy impact assessment with the Office of the Privacy Commissioner | December 31, 2026 | Open | Privacy Officer review | Annual PIA Report |
| Company | Renew operating licence with the Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada | March 31, 2026 | Completed | Legal review | Licence Renewal Certificate |
| Company | Submit quarterly compliance certificate to the board of directors | June 30, 2026 | Open | Board sign-off | Compliance Certificate |
| Company | Submit quarterly compliance certificate to the board of directors | September 30, 2026 | Open | Board sign-off | Compliance Certificate |
| Company | Conduct annual third-party security audit | November 30, 2026 | Open | Audit committee approval | Security Audit Report |
| Vendor | Deliver updated data processing agreement to Company | May 15, 2026 | Open | Legal review | Data Processing Agreement |
| Vendor | Provide evidence of SOC 2 Type II certification | June 30, 2026 | Open | Compliance Officer review | SOC 2 Report |
| Vendor | Renew subprocessor registration with Company | December 1, 2026 | Open | Legal review | Subprocessor Registration |

## Schedule B: Contractual Obligations

| Responsible Party | Obligation | Due Date | Status | Document |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Company | Pay annual platform licence fee of $240,000 to Bluechip Solutions Inc. | May 1, 2026 | Open | Platform Licence Agreement |
| Company | Deliver audit access certificate to Bluechip Solutions Inc. | May 1, 2026 | Open | Platform Licence Agreement |
| Company | Notify Bluechip Solutions Inc. of material changes to Company's data architecture | Within 30 days of change | Open | Platform Licence Agreement |
| Bluechip Solutions Inc. | Deliver updated API documentation to Company | April 30, 2026 | Open | Platform Licence Agreement |
| Bluechip Solutions Inc. | Provide 99.9% uptime guarantee and submit monthly SLA reports to Company | Monthly | Ongoing | Service Level Agreement |

## Schedule C: Employment and HR Obligations

| Responsible Party | Obligation | Due Date | Status | Risk |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Company | Complete annual workplace safety training for all employees | June 30, 2026 | Open | Regulatory |
| Company | File T4 slips and T4 summary with the Canada Revenue Agency | February 28, 2026 | Completed | Tax |
| Company | Complete annual performance reviews for all employees | December 31, 2026 | Open | HR |
| Company | Pay annual RRSP matching contributions for eligible employees | March 31, 2026 | Open | HR |
| Company | Provide written notice of any layoffs to affected employees no later than 8 weeks prior to the effective date | Rolling | Ongoing | Labour |

## Schedule D: Insurance and Risk Obligations

| Responsible Party | Obligation | Due Date | Status | Risk |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Company | Renew commercial general liability insurance policy | July 31, 2026 | Open | Insurance |
| Company | Renew cyber liability insurance policy with minimum coverage of $10,000,000 | July 31, 2026 | Open | Insurance |
| Company | Provide certificate of insurance to Bluechip Solutions Inc. | August 15, 2026 | Open | Contractual |
| Company | Notify insurer of material change in business operations within 30 days of change | Rolling | Ongoing | Insurance |

## Summary Notes

All obligations marked "Open" require action before the due date noted. Responsible parties
must report completion to the compliance officer within 5 business days of satisfying each
obligation.

If the Company fails to satisfy any obligation in Schedule A by the stated due date, the
compliance officer shall notify the board of directors within 2 business days and prepare a
remediation plan within 10 business days.

The Company shall maintain a compliance register recording the date of completion and
evidence document for each satisfied obligation. The register shall be made available to the
board of directors upon request.
